section.title: Projects & Libraries
section.description: From enterprise AI engines to zero-dependency Java libraries — everything built in the open.
section.footerNote: All projects are open source and actively maintained.

items.title: CK8T Agent Builder Studio
items.subtitle: Visual Agentic Workflow Builder
items.description: A node-based visual canvas for building, running, and deploying agentic workflows. Design automation graphs with 30+ block types — AI agents, control flow, DB, API, MCP tools — then execute them in the browser, inside VS Code, or on a standalone Fastify server.
highlights: Drag-and-drop canvas with 30+ block types (Agent, MCP, DB, API, control-flow)
Three runtime targets: browser app, VS Code extension, standalone Node server
Provider-agnostic: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, LM Studio, custom
VS Code extension with webview panel + Copilot chat participant
Skill editor: write JS functions as reusable agent tools
Run trace, debug panel, problems view, and live output per node

items.title: ConvEngine
items.subtitle: Deterministic Conversational Workflow Engine
items.description: A production-grade, database-driven conversational AI framework for Java. Not just a chatbot library — a fully auditable state machine for enterprise conversations where every intent, state transition, and tool call is driven by database configuration.
highlights: 15-step DAG-resolved pipeline per conversation turn
MCP tool orchestration with 7 executor adapter types
Full audit timeline + real-time SSE/STOMP streaming
Rule engine with 6 execution phases (regex → LLM fallback)
Dialogue act classification, state graphs, guardrails
Multi-dialect SQL: Oracle · PostgreSQL · SQLite
v2.0.12 — actively maintained

items.title: ConvEngine Docs
items.subtitle: Documentation Site
items.description: A fully custom Docusaurus v3 documentation site with dual versioning (v1 + v2), interactive React/MDX components, in-browser custom search indexing, and version-aware navigation. Not stock Docusaurus — a productized doc experience.
highlights: Dual-version docs (v1 + v2) with custom switcher
Interactive MDX components: FlowStep, ChatBubble, EngineDebugFlow
Custom in-browser search indexing (no Algolia needed)
Version-aware navbar + localStorage preference persistence
Custom command palette and global term lookup

items.title: ConvEngine Chat
items.subtitle: React Component Library
items.description: A React npm library that integrates ConvEngine's full chat UI into any project with a single component. Supports panel mode, fullscreen mode, dark/light themes, and optional audit stream visualization for developers.
highlights: Drop-in <ConvEngineChat mode="panel" /> component
Panel + Fullscreen display modes
Dark/Light theme toggle built-in
Optional audit stream visualization (showAudit)
Publishable as npm package (ES + UMD builds)

items.title: Excel Processor
items.subtitle: Annotation-Based Excel Processing for Java
items.description: A Java library that brings annotation-driven simplicity to Excel operations. Annotate your POJOs with @Sheet and @Cell, get full read/write/validate pipelines out of the box — no boilerplate Apache POI plumbing.
highlights: Annotation-based @Sheet and @Cell POJO mapping
Built-in validations: required, numeric, email, minItems, maxItems
Conditional and custom validator tasks
AllowedValues annotation for set-based validation
Works with any Java/Spring framework
v3.1.3 — published on Maven Central

items.title: API Processor
items.subtitle: Standardized REST & SOAP Integration Pattern
items.description: A lightweight Java library that enforces a clean Facade → Handler → Delegate architecture for all REST and SOAP integrations. Gives teams a single, testable, retry-capable pattern instead of one-off HTTP client implementations.
highlights: Facade → Handler → Delegate layered architecture
Built-in retry with configurable attempts + backoff
Auth injection: API_KEY, static BEARER
Response mapping: RAW_JSON, JSON_PATH, FIELD_TEMPLATE, TEXT
Circuit breaker window support
Also used natively inside ConvEngine MCP HTTP tools

items.title: JSON Processor
items.subtitle: All-in-One JSON Toolkit for Java
items.description: A combined JSON toolkit for Java that bundles JSON validation, JSON path utilities, and REST API utilities into a single Maven dependency — no more juggling multiple JSON processing libraries.
highlights: JSON Validator + JSON Path Util + REST API Utils in one
Single Maven Central dependency
v2.0.0 — stable and maintained

items.title: JSON Validator
items.subtitle: Annotation-Based JSON Validation for Java
items.description: A Java library for validating JSON payloads using annotations. Define validation rules on your model fields with @JsonKeyValidation, get rich error reports with exact JSON path locations back — no XML config, no external schema files.
highlights: @JsonKeyValidation annotation-driven field rules
Built-in validators: required, email, numeric, minItems, maxItems
Conditional validators + custom task support
Error report includes full JSON path to the issue
Framework-agnostic — works with any Java project

items.title: Mockey
items.subtitle: Lightweight Code-First Mock API Server
items.description: A mock API server built on Express that routes requests through resolver functions to response files. Supports GET/POST, static/dynamic JSON responses, global + per-response delays, auth simulation, and demo order/loan workflow APIs.
highlights: Code-first resolver pattern — no YAML/JSON-only configs
Multi-resolver chains per route (first match wins)
Static JSON, dynamic responses, file serve, and redirects
Global delay + per-response delay override
Auth/JWKS simulation endpoints built in
Ready demo APIs: order + loan workflows
